title: paracryphia alticola var. suaveolens
intro: Paracryphia alticola var. suaveolens is a plant species in the Paracryphia genus, native to New Caledonia, and is known for its medicinal properties. The plant has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Paracryphia alticola var. suaveolens include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat infections and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and stems, and are often used in traditional medicine in the form of infusions or decoctions.
